text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 6 

ALZH_MID 

LABEL: Alzheimer's Disease Mid-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies whether the beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) algorithm 
criteria for Alzheimer's disease on July 1 of the specified reference period. 

SHORT NAME: ALZHM 

LONG NAME: ALZH_MID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary did
